title: David's Temple Weekly Update
subtitle: Helping our church family stay informed, connected, and engaged.

pastor.name: Pastor Keith
pastor.note: Church family, thank you for continuing to serve, invite, and stay engaged. This week, let's keep leaning into what God is doing among us as we grow together in worship, discipleship, and service. I look forward to seeing you this Sunday!

focus.title: This Week's Focus
focus.body: Let's stay connected to God, to each other, and to the mission as we Serve Like Jesus!

sundayInvite.title: Join Us This Sunday!
sundayInvite.body: We invite you to join us for Sunday School and Morning Worship. This Sunday, we will continue growing together through worship, the Word, and fellowship.

upcomingEvents.title: Youth Activity
upcomingEvents.description: Fun, fellowship, and faith-building for our youth.

upcomingEvents.title: Communion Sunday
upcomingEvents.description: Join us as we remember the sacrifice of Jesus.

upcomingEvents.title: Family & Friends Day
upcomingEvents.description: Bring someone with you. Everyone is welcome.

upcomingEvents.title: Church Meeting
upcomingEvents.description: All members are encouraged to attend.

serve.title: Serve & Get Involved
serve.intro: There are many ways to use your gifts and make an impact!
serve.callout: Sign up today and be a blessing!

ministrySpotlight.title: Ministry Spotlight
ministrySpotlight.body: The Social Media Team helps us capture, curate, and communicate what God is doing at David's Temple. If you love creativity and connecting with people, this team is for you!

prayerCare.title: Prayer & Care
prayerCare.intro: Please keep the following in prayer:

stayConnected.title: Stay Connected
stayConnected.intro: Here are 4 simple ways to stay engaged and help our church grow!
items: Share photos in the DT Social app
